The '''Republic freighter''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] trade vessel employed by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Clone Army]] used these transports to trade with other factions. It was a small transportation ship that was mainly used to transport supplies and ammunition to ground troops. The transports were not heavily armed and had to remain concealed to avoid being shot down by enemy forces or be spotted by enemy scouts.

==Appearances==
[[File:GARFreighter.jpg|thumb|left|Transportation Freighter concept art]]
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
